content:
Short answer: **because the app you’re in doesn’t currently have permission to see your Photos**, or it’s opening the **Files picker**, not the **Photos picker**. On iPad, those are two different things, and Apple keeps them pretty strictly separated. Let’s walk it plain.

---

## What’s actually happening

When you tap the **“+” (add)** button and a panel opens on the **left**, you’re almost certainly seeing the **Files interface**, not Photos. The Files picker can show:
- iCloud Drive
- On My iPad
- External drives
- App folders

It **will not show Camera / Photos** unless the app explicitly asks for Photos access and provides a Photos option.
